text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I was just trying to imagine what it would be like
to have a poster of myself hanging somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I bet no one would notice it... Before long, it'd be
all dirty, and the colors would be faded...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-and then, if it happened to fall... People would
step on it and cover it in footprints!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to add to the litter in the streets! I'm
so, so, so sorryyy!
